Thanks for contributing! Please ensure:
1. You have opened an issue first to discuss this change (unless it's a clear bug fix).
2. All commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit --signoff`.
3. Tests pass locally: `npm test`.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Internal/refactor (no user-facing change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All commits are signed off with DCO (`git commit --signoff`)
- [ ] I have added tests where applicable
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] No imports from private Licinexus packages
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
